welcome.title: Welcome to Reeeeecall!
welcome.description: The smartest way to study with flashcards. Create decks, add cards, and let spaced repetition optimize your learning.

createDeck.title: Create Your First Deck
createDeck.description: A deck is a collection of flashcards on a topic. Create one for any subject you want to study.

cardTemplate.title: Choose a Card Template
cardTemplate.description: Templates define how your cards look. Use the default front/back template, or specialized ones for languages and exams.

addCards.title: Add Cards to Your Deck
addCards.description: Add cards manually, import from CSV, or use AI to generate cards automatically from any topic.

firstStudy.title: Start Studying!
firstStudy.description: Choose SRS for long-term memory, or random/sequential for quick review. Rate each card to track progress.

exploreMarket.title: Explore the Marketplace
exploreMarket.description: Discover shared decks from other users. Find study materials for any subject and start learning instantly.

drawerTips.dashboard: Dashboard shows your study stats & streaks
drawerTips.quickStudy: Quick Study starts a session instantly

sessionKicked.headline: Signed in on another device
sessionKicked.description: You've been signed out because your account was used on another device. Reclaim this session to keep using it here.
sessionKicked.info1: An active session was detected on another device
sessionKicked.info2: An automatic limit to keep your account secure
sessionKicked.hint: Only one device can be used at a time

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The screen ran into an unexpected error. Please try again.
